title: Intense Resinous Slovakian Salmon Pate
description: A rich and creamy salmon pate with a resinous flavor, traditionally served in Slovakia as a midnight craving snack, this ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly dish is made with mortar-pestle-pounded ingredients and served in a ramekin.
instructions: In a mortar, pound the smoked salmon with a pestle until it reaches a smooth consistency.
Add the unsalted butter to the mortar and continue pounding until well combined.
Stir in the chopped fresh dill, chives, lemon juice, garlic, and black pepper.
Add the pine resin to the mixture and stir until well combined.
Gradually add the heavy cream to the mixture, stirring until a smooth and creamy pate forms.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Spoon the pate into individual ramekins.
Chill the pate in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Serve the pate chilled, garnished with additional chopped fresh herbs if desired.
